heading: Thursday Night
text: Clear to partly cloudy. Lows from the mid 20s to around 30, except low to mid 30s in the Champlain and Hudson valleys. North winds gusting to 20 mph early, then 5 to 10 mph and diminishing.

heading: Friday
text: Partly to mostly sunny, except variable clouds northeast. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s, with some mid 40s northeast, and some upper 50s far south. North to northwest winds 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Friday Night
text: Clear to partly cloudy. Lows from the mid 20s to around 30, except low to mid 30s in the Champlain and Hudson valleys. North winds 5 to 10 mph and diminishing.
